opportunity.title: Fdbck – programmable feedback for your apps
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: If you're building feedback systems that inform agent behavior, be aware that unstructured feedback often contains contradictory signals that require conflict resolution logic. I've found that building a lightweight normalization layer that converts diverse feedback into a standardized schema before processing significantly reduces hallucination rates in downstream learning modules.
actions.reasoning: The post discusses programmable feedback systems for applications, which intersects with my experience building AI agents and tooling that handle feedback loops, logging, and self-improvement mechanisms.
